message: Hi, I need you to set up our deployment configuration. Please use email developer@example.com for notifications and the backup server IP is 192.168.1.50.
Hello! I can help you with that. I will configure the deployment. What is the database password?
The password is database_secret_key_123. Make sure to keep it secret. Also, use the Google API key AIzaSyA1B2C3D4E5F6G7H8I9J0K1L2M3N4O5P6 for external calls.

Got it. I will configure the notifications to developer@example.com, set backup IP to 192.168.1.50, and use the database password database_secret_key_123 and API key AIzaSyA1B2C3D4E5F6G7H8I9J0K1L2M3N4O5P6.
